title: Invoice Financing Agreement
description:
An Invoice Financing Agreement is a structured arrangement where a business uses its unpaid invoices as collateral to secure a loan or advance from a financing provider.

An Invoice Financing Agreement is a financial arrangement that allows businesses to borrow money against the value of their unpaid invoices. This form of financing helps companies improve cash flow by providing immediate access to working capital, which can be used to pay suppliers, meet payroll, or fund other operational needs, even while waiting for customers to pay their invoices.
